title: yanling.machine-first/v1 config.json
description: Schema for the config.json configuration file of a YanLing RPA script module.

gui_apps.description: List of GUI applications to operate.

web_apps.description: List of web applications to operate.

mobile_apps.description: List of mobile applications to operate.

variables.description: List of global script variable definitions.

api_permissions.description: List of network API access permissions.

worker_dependencies.description: List of worker dependencies required by the script.

script_dependencies.description: List of script module specifiers imported by this script project.

specifier.description: Module identifier including domain, owner, name, and version, parsed from the go.mod file.

package.description: Script package name. Only scripts under this package can be imported and called.

description.description: Description of script functionality and usage.

tags.description: List of script topic tags, for example ["web automation", "data extraction"].

update_time.description: Last update time (last commit time), formatted as RFC3339.

license.description: License, based on the LICENSE file or declaration.

devices.description: List of applicable devices, for example ["windows", "mac", "ubuntu"].

id.description: Unique identifier of the GUI application.

launcher.description: Launcher command or executable path, for example C:\Program Files\App\app.exe or /usr/bin/app.

args.description: Command-line arguments passed to the launcher, for example ["--headless", "--no-sandbox"].

work_dir.description: Working directory for the launched application. If empty, defaults to the directory of the launcher executable.

env.description: List of environment variables in the format KEY=VALUE, for example ["PATH=/usr/bin", "DEBUG=1"].

process.description: Process name associated with the GUI window, used for window detection and management.

launch_uri.description: URI used to open the GUI window, for example weixin://launchapplet?appid=xxxx. If provided, the application will be launched and this URI will be opened.

timeout.description: Timeout in milliseconds for launching the application. If 0, no timeout limit is applied.

wait_time.description: Wait time in milliseconds after launching the application before returning. Useful for allowing the GUI to fully initialize.

window_width.description: Preferred window width in pixels. If 0, uses default.

window_height.description: Preferred window height in pixels. If 0, uses default.

id.description: Unique identifier of the browser application.

browser_type.description: Browser type to use, for example "chrome", "firefox", "edge", "safari". If empty, defaults to system default browser.

url.description: Browser application URL to open, for example https://www.google.com.

incognito.description: Whether to open the browser in private/incognito mode.

args.description: List of additional browser command-line arguments, for example ["--proxy-server=localhost:8080", "--disable-plugins"].

user_data_dir.description: Custom user data directory for the browser profile. If empty, uses the default profile directory.

load_timeout.description: Timeout in milliseconds for page loading. If 0, no timeout limit is applied.

wait_time.description: Wait time in milliseconds after opening the URL before returning. Useful for allowing the page to fully load.

window_width.description: Preferred window width in pixels. If 0, uses default.

window_height.description: Preferred window height in pixels. If 0, uses default.

MobileApplication.description: Mobile application configuration for Android/iOS devices.

id.description: Unique identifier of the mobile application.

package.description: Application package name, for example com.example.app.

activity.description: Activity class name to launch, for example .MainActivity. Used with package to form the component for adb command: adb shell am start -n package/activity.

action.description: Intent action, for example android.intent.action.MAIN or android.intent.action.VIEW. If empty, defaults to android.intent.action.MAIN.

flags.description: Intent flags as a comma-separated list, for example "FLAG_ACTIVITY_NEW_TASK,FLAG_ACTIVITY_CLEAR_TOP". These are passed to adb with --flags parameter.

extras.description: JSON object containing Intent extras (key-value pairs). For example: {"key1": "value1", "key2": "value2"}.

timeout.description: Timeout in milliseconds for starting the application. If 0, no timeout limit is applied.

wait_time.description: Wait time in milliseconds after launching the application before returning. Useful for allowing the app to fully initialize.

save.description: Whether to save the variable to project storage.

VariableDataType.description: Data type of a script variable.

url.description: URL pattern, supporting wildcard (*) and script variable ${var_name}.

permission.description: Access permission, such as r, w, d, rw, or rwd.
